tagline: The AI Employee for Offline Businesses

theme_archetype.description: Clean, authoritative, function-first but highly polished. Inspired by Apple, Stripe, Linear, and Raycast. Combines soft glassmorphism with high-utility layouts. Emphasizes pure white backgrounds with subtle grayscale nesting and a strong primary accent.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Dashboard Control Room Mode. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 with generous gap-6 or gap-8.

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#245AB1] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4A90] px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-medium transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl transition-colors

command_bar.wrapper: w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto rounded-2xl bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] overflow-hidden
command_bar.input: w-full bg-transparent text-2xl px-8 py-6 text-slate-800 placeholder-slate-400 outline-none
command_bar.shortcut_hint: bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-mono

sidebar.wrapper: bg-[#F9FAFB] border-r border-slate-200 h-screen flex flex-col justify-between
sidebar.link_active: bg-white text-[#245AB1] rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 font-medium

inputs.base: w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-slate-800 placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#245AB1]/20 focus:border-[#245AB1] transition-all

component_styles.glass_effects: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with a 1px border-white/40 for floating elements like the topbar, sticky headers, and command palettes.

animations.entrance: Use framer-motion for smooth staggered entrances: initial={{opacity:0, y:10}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}}
animations.micro_interactions: active:scale-[0.98] on buttons, hover translate-y-1 on cards, subtle group-hover icon shifts.

icons.style: Clean, line-based, stroke-width 1.5 or 2 depending on visual weight. Premium feel.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-products', data-testid='command-bar-input')

profile.description: Profile picture of Jay, the business owner.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the Command Bar as the hero element on the Home Dashboard. Apply the glassmorphism backdrop classes provided to make it look magical and high-end, similar to Raycast.
Implement fluid, staggered framer-motion animations for entering cards (Smart Suggestions, Recent Activity) on the dashboard.
Build the dashboard using the specified grid layout logic. Ensure card containers use large paddings (p-6 or p-8) and soft shadows for the Stripe/Linear feel.
Avoid Bootstrap-style visual clutter. Keep the UI airy with plenty of negative space.
Utilize the provided product images to mock out the Products grid and Recent Activity sections to make the demo feel realistic and investor-ready.
All navigation/sidebar links, buttons, and command items MUST include appropriate data-testid attributes for testing.
Apply the primary accent color (#245AB1) sparingly for high-impact actions and active states.
